query:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.phone, u.roles,
       GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(urc.role, ':', urc.city_name) SEPARATOR '; ') as role_cities
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_role_cities urc ON u.id = urc.user_id
WHERE u.username = 'test'
GROUP BY u.id;
